```{include} ../README.md
:end-before: <!-- hide-nav-contributing -->
```

```{include} ../README.md
:start-after: <!-- /hide-nav-contributing -->
:end-before: Each provider has its own README
```

Each provider has its own README with step-by-step credential setup, full API reference, and advanced usage examples:

| Provider | Guide |
|---|---|
| Google Cloud | [Google docs](providers/google.md) |
| Azure | [Azure docs](providers/azure.md) |
| DigitalOcean | [DigitalOcean docs](providers/digitalocean.md) |

> **Security:** All guides recommend storing credentials in a `.env` file (never via `export` in shell history or committed to version control). See each provider README for details.

```{include} ../README.md
:start-after: See each provider README for details.
:end-before: <!-- hide-contributing -->
```
